tasks.label: doppler: sync dev env
args: mkdir -p .vscode/.secrets && doppler secrets download --no-file --format=json --project word-flow --config dev > .vscode/.secrets/dev.json

tasks.label: doppler: sync prod env
args: mkdir -p .vscode/.secrets && doppler secrets download --no-file --format=json --project word-flow --config prd > .vscode/.secrets/prod.json
